changes.description: Added parse_skill_frontmatter() and discover_skills() functions — stdlib-only regex-based YAML frontmatter parser for .md skill files

Added _validate_skills() — checks skill files for frontmatter name field (WARN) and validates command skill path references resolve to existing files (WARN). Imported parse_skill_frontmatter from workflow_utils.
Replaced karpathyChecklist with operatingPrinciples in enforcement properties, removed reviewPrinciples array

verification.command: python3 -c "from scripts.workflow_utils import parse_skill_frontmatter, discover_skills; print('ok')"

verification.result: pass (pre-existing warnings + 15 expected skill frontmatter warnings)
